description_long: This is a large, aggressive-looking combat knife with a single-edged, straight blade featuring a pronounced serrated section along the spine. The blade is robust and tapers to a sharp point, suitable for both cutting and piercing tasks. The handle is cylindrical, wrapped or textured for grip, and includes a prominent knuckle guard adorned with several sharp spikes, enhancing its defensive and offensive capabilities. The guard is circular and separates the blade from the handle, providing additional hand protection. The overall design is utilitarian yet menacing, with no visible decorative elements, emphasizing function over form. The object appears to be constructed primarily from metal, with the handle possibly incorporating a synthetic or rubberized grip.
description: A large, serrated combat knife with a spiked knuckle guard and a textured cylindrical handle. The design is utilitarian and aggressive, emphasizing function and protection.
description_view_0: Top-down view showing the cylindrical handle and the alignment of the blade with the handle.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the full length of the blade, the serrated spine, and the spiked knuckle guard.
description_view_2: Blade-on view showing the thin profile of the blade and the pointed tip.
description_view_3: Opposite side view displaying the serrated edge, blade profile, and the spiked knuckle guard from the other side.
attribute_blade_type: straight, single-edged, serrated spine, pointed tip
attribute_handle_design: cylindrical, textured or wrapped, ergonomic grip
